scripts.build: npm run build -w @forge/types && npm run build -w @forge/tools && npm run build -w @forge/runtime && npm run build -w @forge/server && npm run build -w @forge/cli
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @forge/types && npm run dev -w @forge/server
scripts.dev:cli: npm run build -w @forge/types && npm run dev -w @forge/cli
